ghost.title: The Ghost of Times
ghost.motto: Written by those who lived it. Reporting for those who do.
ghost.blurb: A daily paper in which writers across the centuries — Carlyle, Chesterton, Hemingway, Whitman, Jung and the rest — each file one op-ed on the news of the day.

fingerprint.title: The Fingerprint
fingerprint.kicker: The global programmatic & Advanced TV market paper
fingerprint.motto: All the news that's fit to Fingerprint
fingerprint.blurb: An independent daily wire on the global programmatic and Advanced TV (CTV) market — platforms, performance, partnerships, competition, regulation, political-ad spend, and a five-market global desk, with closing op-eds in the voices of McLuhan and Ogilvy.

descriptions.jung-research: Jung's lifelong wrestle with the self, the spirit, and religion — from the numinous and individuation to Christ as a symbol of the Self, Answer to Job, synchronicity, alchemy, and where Jordan Peterson reads him rightly and wrongly.
descriptions.carlyle-french-revolution-research: A close reading of Carlyle's The French Revolution: A History (1837) — the manuscript Mill's maid burned and Carlyle rewrote from memory, the prophetic fire of 'Carlylese,' its theory of revolution, and its long shadow over Dickens and the historians who followed.
descriptions.uap-research: The UFO/UAP phenomenon from Roswell to the post-2017 disclosure era — the institutions (AARO, NASA, Congress), the evidence and its limits, the Grusch testimony, and where the disclosure question is likely to head through 2030.
